description: This API is used to set voltage threshold for use in frequency relay models. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.6.0. ierr = set_freq_relay_v_thresh(frelvthresh) ierr, frelvthresh = set_freq_relay_v_thresh()

parameters.name: frelvthresh
parameters.description: None. (input; Voltage threshold for use in frequency relay models: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default if ICODE is positive. This value can be used in frequency relay models as the minimum PU voltage for frequency measurement.).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API not met.
